title: Poetry Deep Dive
description: One poet per month — reading them until their rhythms live under your own skin.
summary_pt_br: Imersão em poesia: um poeta por mês. Ler em voz alta toda manhã, decorar três poemas, escrever na voz.

scenes.subtitle_en: One poet per month — reading them until their rhythms live under your own skin.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Imersão em poesia: um poeta por mês. Ler em voz alta toda manhã, decorar três poemas, escrever na voz.

scenes.text_en: One poet per month — reading them until their rhythms live under your own skin. Focus: poetry deep dive. One poet per month, read aloud every morning without exception.
scenes.text_pt: Imersão em poesia: um poeta por mês. Ler em voz alta toda manhã, decorar três poemas, escrever na voz. Foco: poetry deep dive. Um poeta por mês, em voz alta toda manhã.

scenes.title: Poetry Deep Dive
scenes.body_en: Poetry deep dive: one poet for one month. Read aloud every morning. Memorize three poems. Write in their voice. Only then move on to a new poet.
scenes.body_pt: Imersão em poesia: um poeta por mês. Ler em voz alta toda manhã, decorar três poemas, escrever na voz.

examples.en: One poet per month, read aloud every morning without exception.
examples.pt: Um poeta por mês, em voz alta toda manhã.

examples.en: Memorize three poems before you claim to know a poet.
examples.pt: Decore três poemas antes de dizer que conhece um poeta.

examples.en: Write in their voice until your own voice remembers theirs.
examples.pt: Escreva na voz deles até a sua voz lembrar da deles.

exercise.question: Complete: "One poet per month, read aloud every morning without ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "One poet per month, read aloud every morning without exception."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Um poeta por mês, em voz alta toda manhã.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Memorize three poems before you claim to know a poet.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Memorize three poems before you claim to know a poet."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Decore três poemas antes de dizer que conhece um poeta.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Poetry Deep Dive — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre poetry deep dive. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lúcia — one poet for one month. What's the daily habit?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Read aloud every morning without fail.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How many poems do you memorize?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Three, before I claim to know them.
turns.pt_hint: Três antes de dizer que conheço.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Write in their voice for a week.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Why only one poet at a time?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Depth beats breadth at this level.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Poetry lived inside is poetry truly read.

scenes.title: A month with one poet
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the four-step deep dive. Use at least three poetry terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On the first morning of her month with Mary Oliver, Dona Lúcia read the entire collection aloud before breakfast.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Read aloud every single morning — a poet's cadence settles into your own speech long before you notice it consciously.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: And you memorize three poems before you let yourself claim that you actually know the poet at all?

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Yes. Then I write in their voice for a week — until my sentences breathe the same way their sentences do.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: The month is complete only when their cadence returns to me unbidden, even when I'm not thinking about them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Poetry lived inside, Lúcia knew, is poetry truly read — every other form of reading was simply visiting.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Poetry Deep Dive". One poet per month — reading them until their rhythms live under your own skin. One poet per month, read aloud every morning without exception. Memorize three poems before you claim to know a poet. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Poetry Deep Dive". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Poetry Deep Dive".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Poetry Deep Dive".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
